h1: Custom Water Bottles for Your Team, Event, or Brand
metaDescription: Order custom water bottles for your team or event. Choose from stainless steel, aluminum, and plastic options with your logo. Low MOQs and fast turnaround.
introHtml:
Marketing directors, HR directors, and safety managers know that a branded water bottle is one of the most practical and visible giveaways you can offer. Whether you need hydration solutions for a corporate wellness program, a trade show giveaway, or employee safety kits, custom water bottles keep your logo in hand all day long.

Perfect Imprints stocks a wide range of styles to fit your budget and use case. Choose from stainless steel double-wall bottles for hot or cold drinks, lightweight aluminum bottles for outdoor events, and BPA-free plastic options for everyday office use. Popular picks include the 32 oz Baltic Collection Water Bottle for long-lasting insulation, the 20 oz Dual Opening Stainless Steel Water Bottle for easy drinking, and the 24 oz Slim Fit Water Bottle with Push-Pull Lid for gym goers.

All bottles can be decorated with your logo via screen printing, laser engraving, or full-color digital print. Minimum order quantities start as low as 12 pieces for in-stock items, with production lead times averaging 10–14 business days. Request a free sample before placing your bulk order to ensure the perfect fit.

faqs.q: What materials are available for custom water bottles?
faqs.a: We offer stainless steel (double-wall insulated and single-wall), aluminum, and BPA-free plastic bottles. Stainless steel is best for temperature retention, aluminum is lightweight and eco-friendly, and plastic is affordable and shatter-resistant.

faqs.q: What are the minimum order quantities (MOQs) for water bottles?
faqs.a: MOQs vary by product. In-stock items like the 16 oz Sport Pint can be ordered as low as 12 pieces. Custom colors or full-wrap prints may require 100+ units. Contact your account manager for exact MOQs on your chosen bottle.

faqs.q: How can I add my logo to a water bottle?
faqs.a: We offer screen printing for simple logos, laser engraving for a premium etched look, and full-color digital wrap for photorealistic designs. Each method has different setup costs and lead times. We’ll help you choose the best option for your artwork.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide free samples of blank bottles. You can request a sample of any in-stock bottle to check size, material, and feel. Custom decorated samples are available at cost with a deposit that applies to your final order.

faqs.q: What is the typical production lead time?
faqs.a: Standard production is 10–14 business days from artwork approval. Rush orders can be completed in 5–7 business days for an additional fee. Shipping time depends on your location and method. We’ll provide an exact timeline with your quote.

heroAltText: Assorted custom water bottles with company logos, including stainless steel, aluminum, and plastic options for corporate gifts and events.
